description: Small PressPilot OS building blocks you can plug into workflows.

modules.name: Analyze Brand Input
modules.purpose: Translate a logo, URL, or text brief into a structured view of tone, audience, niche, and goals.
inputs: Logo image OR brand description OR URL

modules.name: Generate Color Palette
modules.purpose: Map palette_id + brand cues from PressPilotNormalizedContext to 5–7 accessible palette options for theme tokens.

modules.name: Choose Google Font Pair
modules.purpose: Select heading and body font pairs from the curated Google Fonts list using font_pair_id + vibe from PressPilotNormalizedContext.

modules.name: Build Pattern Set
modules.purpose: Assemble hero, pricing, features, and contact patterns using tokens/content inside PressPilotNormalizedContext plus layout presets.
outputs: Pattern files for hero, pricing, features, and contact sections

modules.name: Apply Business Inputs
modules.purpose: Take a PressPilotSaaSInput payload and normalize it into a PressPilotNormalizedContext with slug, RTL flag, and explicit mode/nav requirements (see Stage 02 spec for full TypeScript interfaces).

modules.name: Generate Menu Page From PDF
modules.purpose: Extract menu items and pricing from normalized restaurant data or a PDF to build the menu page plus navigation entry.
inputs: Optional menu PDF URL from modes.restaurant.menu_pdf_url
outputs: Navigation entry descriptor for Menu item

modules.name: Generate WooCommerce Seed Content
modules.purpose: Create starter products, categories, and copy for ecommerce mode using PressPilotNormalizedContext.
outputs: WooCommerce seed data JSON (products, categories, basic settings)

modules.name: Generate Static Site Bundle
modules.purpose: Take the selected variation, PressPilotNormalizedContext, and assets to build a static HTML/CSS/JS version of the site.
outputs: Static site file listing ready for zipping
